channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Report: Xbox Disc-to-Digital Feature in Testing, Microsoft "Likely" to Stop Disc Production Too - Digital Foundry
item.description:

  2. Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection  The Verge
  3. Xbox may allow gamers to digitize their physical game collection  Mashable
  4. Xbox canceled ad reportedly compared physical vs digital media and highlighted the benefits of owning a disc  PC Guide
  5. Xbox is reportedly considering dropping disc drives as it tests new feature that lets players digitize physical games  GamesIndustry.biz
